LanguageData.UB_Seal_Arsonist.title: arsonist
LanguageData.UB_Seal_Arsonist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] strongly believed that the world needed to be purified with fire. It was the solution to most problems and if needed, [PAWN_pronoun] started the fire [PAWN_objective]self. Wanted for arson and destruction of private property, [PAWN_pronoun] fled across the country and managed to never get caught.
LanguageData.UB_Seal_QuarrySlave.title: quarry slave
LanguageData.UB_Seal_QuarrySlave.description: After being found guilty of theft, [PAWN_nameDef] was sent to work in a quarry as a punishment. Living conditions were disastrous and the work was dangerous. Other slaves often ended up severly injured, and protests were severely repressed by reducing the daily food rations.
